meaning: n.即将孵出或刚孵出的小鸟,(尤指)小鸡
examples: The chick initially has no fear of man.
The chick will soon feather out.
A weasel ran off with a chick in its mouth.
The Cathy family is known for establishing the Chick-fil-A fast-food restaurant empire based in Atlanta.
If you are a hot German chick and you sing about nuclear war, you are Nena.
